title: Run APIs in 50 spots: what breaks first
meta_description: Cut API latency 60% by running in 50 edge locations — cache stampedes, clock drift, and write fan-out mistakes most teams make in 2026.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn 40% of their cloud bill on API egress they don’t need.

They also forget about clock drift across 50 edge locations.
